zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve於大約1260年出生時，他的父親Dietrich VII. von Kleve35歲，母親Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim22歲。他於大約1282年與N. N.結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1309年享年51歲。

zh-hans.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: 荷兰努-布拉班特奧易爾特
zh-hans.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve于大约1260年出生时，他的父亲Dietrich VII. von Kleve35岁，母亲Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim22岁。他于大约1282年与N. N.结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1309年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .
Chinese: variant of   Wong  .
Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
German: variant of   Klever   2.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

variants.name: Cleve
meanings: English: variant of   Cliff  .
German: variant of   Kleve  .

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

variants.name: Diederick
meanings: from þeud ‘people’ + rīc ‘power’. See Terry .

nameMeanings.name: Luf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Swedish: from Old Norse Úlfr ‘wolf’. See Wolf .

variants.name: Uffe
meanings: variant of   Ulf .

variants.name: Ulv
meanings: spelling of   Ulf .

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve was born about 1260, his father, Dietrich VII. von Kleve, was 35 and his mother, Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, was 22. He married N. N. about 1282. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died about 1309, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve est né environ 1260, son père, Dietrich VII. von Kleve, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé N. N. environ 1282. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1309, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve um 1260 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich VII. von Kleve 35 und seine Mutter Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim 22. Er hat um 1282 N. N. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1309 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve è nato il circa 1260, il suo padre, Dietrich VII. von Kleve, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato N. N. circa 1282. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1309, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: オランダノオルド-ブラバントオイルスチオト
ja.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグヘインスバーグ
ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich Luf II. von Kleveが約1260年に生まれた時，父Dietrich VII. von Kleveは35歳，母Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheimは22歳であった。約1282年にN. N.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1309年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve(이)가 대략 1260년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich VII. von Kleve(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1282년 N. N.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1309년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.um 1260–um 1309: tany ho any amin'ny 1260–tany ho any amin'ny 1309

pt.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Oirschot, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve nasceu aproximadamente 1260, seu pai, Dietrich VII. von Kleve, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com N. N. aproximadamente 1282. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1309, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve родился около 1260 г., его отцу по имени Dietrich VII. von Kleve было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени N. N. около 1282 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер около 1309 г. в возрасте 51 год.

sm.um 1260–um 1309: e tusa o le 1260–e tusa o le 1309

es.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Oirschot, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve nació aproximadamente 1260, su papá, Dietrich VII. von Kleve, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim, tenía 22 años. Se casó con N. N. aproximadamente 1282. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1309, a la edad de 51 años.
